_description: The progress message is replaced entirely with the complete pipeline output. This example shows the content brief result. In production, this would be the full Content Research Results block layout from slack-ux-content-research.json followed by the brief.

text.text:
*Top Stories*

1. *OpenAI Launches GPT-5 with Real-Time Reasoning* — _Lead story. None of the 5 competitors have covered the inference-time reasoning angle yet. High urgency._

2. *YC W26 Batch Signals AI Infrastructure Boom* — _Strong TLDR angle: 68% AI focus is highest ever. Competitor Morning Brew covered but missed the infra-vs-app breakdown._

3. *Rust Foundation Announces 2026 Roadmap* — _Developer audience hook. No competitor coverage. Good for engagement._

elements.text: :white_check_mark: Research | :white_check_mark: Competitor Analysis | :white_check_mark: Brief Generation — Pipeline complete
